test.note: Test suite has 6 pre-existing failures unrelated to closeout command. 977 tests passed, 6 failed in issue-liveness and issue-archive-stale tests. All 9 closeout-truth tests pass.

typecheck.note: Pre-existing type errors in board-claim.ts and workspace-runtime.ts unrelated to closeout command (Drizzle-orm type mismatches). CLI and closeout-related code passes typecheck.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add conventions for CLI closeout truth command classification mapping - server 'clean' maps to CLI 'pushed' for consistent terminology across surfaces.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cli/src/commands/mission-cell.ts:70-82 - mapServerClassification function correctly implements the convention but it's not documented in AGENTS.md

summary: Milestone cli-closeout-command has passed scrutiny validation. The cli-closeout-truth-command feature is fully implemented with correct server API integration, classification mapping (server 'clean' → CLI 'pushed'), human-readable colored output via picocolors, JSON output support via --json flag, and graceful error handling for API unavailable and non-existent mission IDs. All 8 validation assertions (VAL-CLI-001 through VAL-CLI-008) are covered by 9 passing tests. Pre-existing test failures (6) and type errors (Drizzle-orm) are unrelated to this milestone.
